A musical comedy set in Elizabethan England pokes fun at the brand of David and Victoria Beckham.

'Macbecks' written by Apres Match and I Keano star, Gary Cooke, is the latest football inspired comedy to come to the stage of the Olympia Theatre.

This is a slightly different take on their story.

Co-writer Malachy McKenna describes it as a silly love story. The part of Macbecks is played by Paul Reid and Kelly Gough plays Poshoria. Both say that their roles are challenging but good fun.

An RTÉ News report broadcast on 12 January 2009. The reporter is Laura Fletcher.

Sections of the seafront and Victorian promenade at Bray are in danger of collapsing into the sea.
